title: LIMIT / OFFSET support still broken
poc: CREATE TABLE query_users (user_id INT, user_name VARCHAR(255));
SELECT query_users.user_id, query_users.user_name FROM query_users ORDER BY query_users.user_id LIMIT 1000000 OFFSET 5;
key_bug_features: LIMIT and OFFSET not functioning correctly in queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_users (user_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT user_name FROM test_users WHERE user_id > 2 ORDER BY user_id LIMIT 2;
SELECT user_id, user_name FROM test_users WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0;
